name: Commercial Vehicle Group, Inc.
description: Commercial Vehicle Group, Inc. is a leading provider of electrical wire harnesses, passenger and commercial vehicle seats, plastic trim, and other cab structures and systems. The company designs and manufactures electrical systems, seating systems, and vehicle components for the commercial vehicle, construction, agricultural, and industrial markets globally. Headquartered in New Albany, Ohio, CVG operates manufacturing facilities across North America, Europe, and Asia, delivering innovative solutions to major original equipment manufacturers.
